name: codex-process-jobs
description: Launch and manage durable, detached local process jobs from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Durable detached process jobs for Codex
interface.longDescription: Launch long-running local commands as tracked detached process groups, inspect bounded output, wait for completion, retrieve results, and cancel safely on macOS or Linux.
defaultPrompt: Run this build as a tracked background job.
Show my active and recent process jobs.
Open the result of the latest finished job.
